div.p: bash ncu --set full -o report ./my_app ncu-ui report.ncu-rep
Decision Logic: Memory Throughput > 75%? → Memory-bound Compute Throughput > 75%? → Compute-bound Both < 50%? → Latency-bound
Verification Checklist: ✓ Kernel time decreased? ✓ Target metric improved? ✓ No new bottlenecks introduced? ✓ Document before/after metrics
FLOPS │ ╱──────────────── │ ╱ Compute-bound │ ╱ (horizontal roof) │ ╱ │╱ Memory-bound │ (diagonal slope = BW) └──────────────────── FLOPs/Byte

g.text: • Avoid bank conflicts in shared memory
